generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for raw point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RawLiDARPointClouds
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i Depth Camera for depth perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RawDepthData
]

instance SpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor measuring speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle steering angle sensor measuring steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSteeringAngleData
]

instance RawLiDARPointClouds : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance RawDepthData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SpeedSensor
]

instance VehicleSteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance RawLiDARPointCloudsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RawLiDARPointClouds
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetpack50SDK
]

instance RawDepthDataData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw depth data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RawDepthData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetpack50SDK
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetpack50SDK
]

instance VehicleSteeringAngleDataData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetpack50SDK
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed object tracks from DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RawLiDARPointClouds, VehicleSpeedData, VehicleSteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state data storage"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData, VehicleSteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking model using DBSCAN and Kalman filter"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetpack50SDK
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC control model compliant with ISO 15622"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetpack50SDK
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D visualization model for environmental rendering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetpack50SDK
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for component integration"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for application modules"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for application modules"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for application modules"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance MATLAB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB for application modules"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance Simulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulink for application modules"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance ISO23247ReferenceArchitecture : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for design"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for vehicle state and object track storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data Monitoring: real-time visualization, saving, and reporting of vehicle state and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeObjectTracksDisplay, VehicleStateDisplay, ProjectedPathDisplay
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation Offloading: ACC processing on DT instead of vehicle ECU"
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote Management: UI-based control of ACC functions"
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D Visualization: displaying object tracks, path, vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeObjectTracksDisplay, VehicleStateDisplay, ProjectedPathDisplay
]

instance RealTimeObjectTracksDisplay : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time object tracks display for driver trust"
]

instance VehicleStateDisplay : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Vehicle state display for driver trust"
]

instance ProjectedPathDisplay : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected path display for driver trust"
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller converting desired speed commands into motor voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo component adjusting steering angle"
]

instance LowerLevelChassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lower-level chassis for steering and speed control"
]

instance UpperLevelChassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Upper-level chassis"
]

instance JetsonNX : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX microcomputer"
]

instance OrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Orin Nano microcomputer"
]

instance AutonomousVehicleSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle retrofitted onto a Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium chassis"
    base:contains LowerLevelChassis, UpperLevelChassis, JetsonNX, OrinNano, HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelD435iDepthCamera, VedderElectronicSpeedController, SteeringServo, SpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "ACC system computes desired speed based on lead vehicle distance, sent via Actuation FE as motor voltage commands; remote commands (enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, emergency braking) from User Entity Control Panel."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with end-to-end latency ≤100 ms between vehicle and DT Entity (per R7) and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms (per R8) for event ordering and coordination."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entity-based structure with Physical Twin Entity (sensors, actuators), Digital Twin Entity (data processing, ACC), User Entity (visualization, control), Cross-System Entity (data translation), communicating via ROS2 intra-entity and Wi-Fi inter-entity."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design phase (cyber-physical experimentation for ADAS development) and operational phase (real-time monitoring and optimization of vehicle performance)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "ACC implementation adheres to ISO 15622 Performance Class I specifications (no road curvature), validated through compliance with standard requirements."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 network for intra-entity communication, Wi-Fi for inter-entity, Data Translation FE handling serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversions; latency ≤100 ms."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity runs on vehicle-mounted NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano; Digital Twin Entity components (e.g., Data Storage) hosted on external devices; User Entity deployed on separate hardware."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 for reference architecture; ISO 15622 for ACC functional requirements."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical system with strict latency (≤100 ms) and clock synchronization (100 ms accuracy) requirements to ensure reliable operation; no explicit security measures detailed."
]
